description: A vulnerability was found in CodeAstro Gym Management System 1.0. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the file /admin/update-progress.php. Performing a manipulation of the argument id/ini_weight results in sql injection. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made public and could be used.
